motivationalMessages.excellent: Tsoelo-pele e ntle haholo! Tswela pele ka matla ana.
motivationalMessages.good: Mosebetsi o motle! Boikitlaetso bo bong bo tla o isa bokgoning bo felletseng.

attentionActions.critical: Bokgoni ba hao bo tlase hajoale. Hlahloba thuto ya motheo mme o qete dipotso tsa boikoetliso tse lebisitsweng.
attentionActions.weak: O haufi le boemo ba boitshepo. Hlahloba sehlooho sena mme o etse boikoetliso bo bokgutshwane ba phetapheto.
attentionActions.revision: Etsa kakaretso e potlakileng le mosebetsi o le mong wa boikoetliso ho tiisa sehlooho sena.
